## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Auror and GrowthX to explore GrowthX's AI-powered content creation platform and services.](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive AI-powered content creation platform with advanced workflows for research, writing, fact-checking, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Their service includes a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing content production (typically $12K/month for 12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Auror is evaluating multiple tools/agencies for content, SEO, and ABM; GrowthX could potentially address multiple needs](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Auror has upcoming Q2 planning; any decision on GrowthX would likely come after that](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

## Topics

### Auror's Current Situation and Needs

  - [In Q2 planning process; formal GTM strategy to be determined in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Evaluating multiple tools/agencies:](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [AI workflow tool for marketers (likely to move forward with one called Tofu)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Traditional SEO agencies (2 options being considered)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Content creation support (GrowthX could fill this gap)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Challenges in scaling content production in-house](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Need to better document processes and "replicate" CMO's knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Exploring ways to support content, product marketing, and trust/safety teams](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [AI-powered content creation platform with advanced workflows](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Key components:](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
      - [Research workflow using Perplexity Pro to generate rich questions](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
      - [Fact-checking workflow to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)
      - [Content optimization for SEO and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
      - [Ability to generate various content types (blog posts, landing pages, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [Platform still being developed; some features like collaborative editing coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)

### GrowthX Service Offering

  - [6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
      - [Develop content strategy, personas, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
      - [Create AI-ready templates and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Ongoing content production (typically 12 months, $12K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [Daily publishing after strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
      - [Flexible based on client needs ($9-15K/month range)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focus on creating valuable, multi-purpose content](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Not just blog posts - explore unique content experiences (e.g. interactive product demos)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [Align content with product marketing and key use cases](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Consider programmatic content opportunities where relevant](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)

### Potential Value for Auror

  - [Scale content production without additional headcount](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Support product marketing efforts (new product/use case pages)](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Address sensitive topics (e.g. facial recognition) with appropriate messaging](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Potential to replace or augment planned product marketing hire](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send formal SOW (Statement of Work) to Camille](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Camille to bring GrowthX option to Auror's upcoming strategy session](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Potential follow-up to align on Auror's specific needs and GrowthX's ability to deliver](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [If Camille wants to move forward, GrowthX's Marcel available for additional discussions/closing](https://fathom.video/share/W2QpNvHy5MNuGy7AN7sye-yiKiUJ4Tpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
